reference: I just had a sharp pain in my chest and extreme back pain that lasted approximately forty-five minutes, and now I feel fine. I had this approximately a year ago, went to a cardiologist, had a stress test and echocardiogram, and everything came out good. They did find a mildly enlarged aorta. Does this pain have to do with that?
text: I just had a sharp pain in my chest and extreme back pain that lasted approximately 45 minutes, and now I feel fine. I had this approximately a year ago, went to a cardiologist, had a stress test and echocardiogram, and everything came out good. They did find a mildly enlarged aorta. Does this pain have to do with that?
